content: Apple Inc. was founded on April 1, 1976, by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne in Cupertino, California. The company was initially called Apple Computer Company and was later renamed Apple Computer Inc. in 1977, before becoming Apple Inc. in 2007.
